title: adicea ovalis
intro: Adicea ovalis, also known as the ovalis plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adicea ovalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, where the leaves are steeped in hot water to release its medicinal compounds, or as a decoction, where the plant material is simmered in water to create a stronger extract.
